propped up by excessive government
spending to Paradigm B which is a
buoyant e-shaped economy that shifts the
burden of generating economic output
back to the private sector likely
requires an an adjustment period

markets associated with Paradigm a to

the entire purpose of our kid
construction process to is to simplify
investing in a way that allows investors
to maximize upside capture during bull
markets and minimize downside capture
during bare markets kiss is not designed
to you know predict growth liquidity
inflation fed policy us fiscal policy
European fiscal policy you know the
geopolitical risk it's a systematic risk
management overlay an Institutional
grade riskmanagement overlay that does
exactly what it's supposed to do which
is maximize upside capture and bull
markets and minimize downside capture
and bare markets if you compare so this
right here in this in the screen you're
showing our kiss construction back test
it's a rolling out of sample back test
is to prevent look ahead bias and the uh
and so if you're going to compare kiss
which is a 60310 trend following
strategy featuring 60% % stocks when
it's maxed out 30% gold when it's maxed
out and 10% Bitcoin when it's maxed out
and those those Max positions go up and
down based on the risk management
signals uh you know when you're
comparing kiss to let's say 6040 which
is you know a line share of a lot of you
know retirement type money uh kiss has
an upside capture ratio relative to 6040
of
237 per over the lifetime of this
rolling out of sample back test which
begins in January of 2018 that compares
to a downside capture ratio relative to
6040 if only 4 % so you're essentially
you know tripling the the the the 6040
return while only you know taking less
than half of the draw down when when
when 6040 draws down if you wanted to
compare kiss uh uh to a a sort of naked
long fully invested at all times 60 3010
portfolio of of stocks gold and Bitcoin

ratio to that portfolio with only a 44%
downside capture ratio so more than a 2
